_meta.name: RunPod H100 운영 SSOT (골화)
_meta.description: RunPod H100 pod 임대/셋업/실행 경로 단일진실. anima/hexa-lang 학습 발사 표준 절차.
_meta.rule: 이 파일이 변경되면 training/Dockerfile.h100, training/anima-entrypoint.sh 도 동기 검증할 것
_meta.related_ssot: shared/state/training_speed_ceilings.json — ALM/CLM MFU 측정 천장 + 헤드룸 + 레버 (매 런 갱신)

pod_fleet_variance.finding: 동일 software stack에서 H100 SXM 80GB 풀팟 사이 31.5% step/min 차이 측정
evidence: ubzp169igb7tns (anima-p4-alm-r7): 51.1 step/min, 62.6% MFU @ b=1 s=1024 g=8 --unsloth (r7 step 100)
pod_fleet_variance.implication: MFU 측정값은 pod_id 태그 필수. cross-pod 비교 시 variance 보정 필요. r7 측정 일부는 fast pod 운에서 옴.
pod_fleet_variance.rule: 신규 측정 모두 pod_id + 동일 pod a/b 권장

alm_stack_learnings.audit_miscalibration_lesson: r6 7-패치 audit 추정치(+50%)는 실측 +3.1%로 무너짐. 원인: Qwen2 이미 SDPA 사용 (FA2 noop), grad_ckpt 애초에 비활성, dataloader workers 회귀, torch.compile output_hidden_states 행동 hang.
real_winners: Unsloth 2026.4.4 (+39% r7 측정, 단 stack drift transformers/peft/torch bump 혼합)
b=8 s=1024 g=1 sweep optimal (+8.3 MFU points 무료, micro-batch >> grad_accum)
Liger fused kernels (+10-15% rope/rms_norm/swiglu 단독 효과)
stuck_points: Qwen2 MLP bias term → Unsloth fast-LoRA MLP 48 layers 비활성 (구조적 한계)
torch.compile + LoRA + HoloMapHead → dynamo 48+ graph break cascade
alm_stack_learnings.next_breakthrough_lever: FP8 via transformer_engine on torch 2.9 dedicated pod (r8c track) — 989 → 1979 TFLOP/s 천장 2x

tracks_landed_this_session: Track B contrastive cache: 27.5 s → 45.94 ms phi eval (598x interpreted)
Tensor primitive raw f32: 4,757x vs list-backed @ 128² matmul (isolated)
nn_core Tensor port: 1000 ms → 0.681 ms real training step (1479x, FFI-bound regime)
hexa_v2.bt74 deploy: full train_clm.hexa native binary runs end-to-end (251x vs interpreter)
clm_native_compile_breakthroughs.remaining_frontier: Real 14B CLM shapes (seq=512 d=4096) where BLAS throughput becomes binding (현재 작은 shape에서 FFI-bound). #30 sweep 진행 중.

completed_runs.name: anima-clm-alm-bench
completed_runs.purpose: CLM + ALM step 0 속도 측정 (1회성 벤치)

verified._note: 1024² 작은 매트릭스에서 hexa interpreter dispatch 오버헤드가 지배적. 큰 매트릭스에서 utilization 상승 예상.

bug_fixed.name: cross-module mut globals not propagating
bug_fixed.symptom: G_CUBLAS_HANDLE = 0 in gpu_sgemm even though cuda_init successfully created it
bug_fixed.root_cause: hexa interpreter creates independent copies of `let mut` module-level globals across `use` boundaries
bug_fixed.fix: replaced `let mut G_X = ptr_null()` + `G_X = alloc_raw(N)` with `let G_X = alloc_raw(N)` (immutable binding pointing to heap buffer); added `get_cublas_handle()` / `get_cuda_stream()` accessors that deref persistent buffers

CLM._note: train_gpu.hexa는 5+개 use chain으로 모듈 로딩이 매우 느려서 측정 못 함 (150초+ 멈춤). train_full.hexa는 self-contained이라 즉시 동작.
CLM._note_loss: loss가 변화 없음 — synthetic random data + low LR로 추정. 속도는 측정 OK.

ALM.result: PASS — loss decreased, LoRA fine-tune harness converging
